specific_question: What was the average time for dealerships to respond to customers' inquiries about Elexion Automotive in 2024?
answer: In 2024, Elexion Automotive dealerships took an average of 3 hours to respond to online customer enquiries, with 21% of leads not receiving any response.
dr_question: How will Elexion Automotive's adoption of a complete direct-to-customer sales model by 2026 affect sales cycle duration, conversion rates, and average revenue per customer across the United States with franchise laws?
